## Description

<!-- What does this PR add or change? -->

## Pattern Checklist

If this PR adds or modifies a pattern, confirm:

- [ ] Frontmatter includes all required fields (`title`, `pillar`, `status`, `tags`)
- [ ] File is in the correct pillar directory
- [ ] All 10 body sections are present
- [ ] "When NOT to Use It" section is included and substantive
- [ ] At least one trade-off is documented
- [ ] Code examples are minimal and runnable
- [ ] Content is vendor-neutral and tool-agnostic
- [ ] No marketing language or promotional content
- [ ] Related patterns are linked

## Type

- [ ] New pattern
- [ ] Pattern improvement
- [ ] Site/infrastructure change
- [ ] Documentation update
